commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 3 July

NYSE dominates liquidity rankings with the tightest ILLIQ metric (0.0017) and competitive spreads across both Roll and AR measures. Conversely, the London Stock Exchange trails significantly, exhibiting an ILLIQ reading nearly 79 times higher (0.1343) and elevated AR spreads (0.8167%). Notably, Nasdaq 100 presents an anomaly—superior ILLIQ liquidity (0.0029) undermined by substantially wider Roll spreads (1.7293%), suggesting concentrated trading activity with elevated transaction costs.
